name: Exiting  the abyss
overview: The events of the series revolve around (Umm Mubarak) who suffers from the injustice and injustice of her husband (Abu Mubarak) and his constant insult to her, and the son (Mubarak) who suffers from the influence of bad friends, through his friend (Nasser), who swept him into the world of gambling and drugs, what will be the fate of that family?
